reasoning: The primary focus here is addressing the lactate clearance limiter to enhance aerobic base and fatigue resistance. The last ride showed a conservative effort, and today we'll amp it up to build on that base. This workout will directly help Koren perform effectively on the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (6 min @ 242-256W, 4 min @ 201-218W) with 3 min recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
